title: التعامل مع الصراعات في العلاقات
citation: Al-Krenawi, A., & Graham, J.R. (2000). Culturally sensitive social work practice with Arab clients in mental health settings. Health & Social Work, 25(1), 9-22.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words). Cover: relationship conflict — face-saving resolution; indirect communication; wasta and community as indirect repair channels. Khaleeji register.
